codeReview.summary: The commit adds a dev-gated TestSign panel on Dashboard with 64-hex validation, keyboard-accessible submit naming, dispatch to handleRuntimeCommand({type:'sign', message_hex_32}), and production-path gating via import.meta.env.DEV. The implementation and tests align with the feature description and expected behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ui-screen-worker skill currently hard-requires agent-browser/manual visual verification and a Playwright demo-gallery run for every feature, but this worker completed and was marked as following procedure without either for a dev-only dashboard affordance. The skill procedure appears too rigid for scoped DEV-gated panel work.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/ui-screen-worker/SKILL.md ('Required Skills' and 'Verify' sections) vs transcript skeleton for workerSessionId 54e246ab-d32b-4051-b4e5-88e6f003869d (no agent-browser tool invocation, no Playwright command) and handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission guidance says not to re-report the known nested-button PeersPanel issue in discoveredIssues, but this handoff includes it anyway. This suggests worker guidance/checklists may need stronger reinforcement of the AGENTS known-issues exception.
